=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/test.ts(5,25): error TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
/.src/test.ts(8,23): error TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
/.src/test.ts(10,22): suggestion TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `Address`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)
/.src/test.ts(11,30): error TS2694: Namespace '"/node_modules/effect/dist/dts/Schema"' has no exported member 'Type'.


==== /.src/tsconfig.json (0 errors) ====
    {
      "compilerOptions": {
        "plugins": [
          {
            "name": "@effect/language-service"
          }
        ]
      }
    }

==== /.src/test.ts (4 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics preferSchemaTypeProperty:error
    import { Schema, Schema as S } from "effect"
    
    export const AddressId = Schema.String
    export type AddressId = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof AddressId>
                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
    
    export const Address = Schema.Struct({ id: AddressId })
    export type Address = S.Schema.Type<typeof Address>
                          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377104: Do not use `Schema.Schema.Type<typeof X>` to extract a schema's type. Use `typeof X.Type` instead. effect(preferSchemaTypeProperty)
    
    type GoodTypeQuery = typeof Address.Type
                         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377090: This `typeof ... .Type` query can be replaced with `Address`. effect(unnecessaryTypeofType)
    type GoodSchemaType = Schema.Type<typeof Address>
                                 ~~~~
!!! error TS2694: Namespace '"/node_modules/effect/dist/dts/Schema"' has no exported member 'Type'.
